title: Assorted Appetizers
description: Various assorted foodstuffs... not all of which, admittedly, are appetizers.
body:
Adds a variety of foodstuffs, some with unique effects and descriptions. Designed for [ModFest '26](https://modfest.net/26). No recipes are present at the moment - maybe in the future, but for now this is creative/admin-only (sorry!). Planned features include being able to place down ice cream glasses and maybe burgers. Speaking of which...
AA features twenty ice creams, ranging from coffee (yes, really) to mint chocolate to... spaghetti???
Also present are seven burgers (and one rib sandwich) plus three types of sushi roll and four of slice...
...as well as TWO HUNDRED (and twenty) drinks. Yes, really. There's a lot~!
Food Effects Gas Station Sushi: Wither IV for 10 seconds.
Carp Sushi: Poison IV for 30 seconds.
Carp Sushi Slice: Poison I for 5 seconds.
Sashimi: Poison II for 10 seconds.
Coffee...? Ice Cream: Speed II for 30 seconds.
Aesir Salad: Every (well, almost) positive potion effect at level V for 60 seconds.
Eden Salad: Acts like Aesir Salad, with slightly less effects, level II, and 30 seconds.
One-Minute Blinding Stew: ...this one is self-explanatory.
Rice & Pork: Regeneration II for 30 seconds.
Drink Effects Blood Glass: Regeneration I for 15 seconds.
Clown Blood: Regeneration II for 15 seconds.
Demon Blood: Regeneration III for 30 seconds.
Doctor's Delight: 30s Regen IV, 30s Absorption IV, Instant Health II, 30s Resistance II.
Dragon's Blood: 300 seconds Fire Resistance, 30s Regeneration IV, 30s Resistance IV.
Villager's Delight: 300 seconds of Hero of the Village V.
Eminence: Same as Aesir Salad.
Fourteen Loko: 30s of Speed V, Haste V, Poison X, and Wither X.
Grog: Removes nanomach- uh, all status effects.
Ice Glass: Slowness II for 30 seconds.
Lamplighter: Glowing for 60 seconds.
Mayojito: Poison I for 60 seconds.
Neurotoxin: Wither X for 60 seconds.
"Berry" Juice: Secret~
"Wine" Glass: Secret~
Pure Sugar: Speed IV for 30 seconds.
Toxins Special: 60 seconds of most negative effects at level V.
